history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A digital poster shows a stylized anime-like character holding a handgun-like object, with large purple title text and additional white text over a cloudy, nighttime background and a CRT-style monitor in the lower right.

Main Subject:
On the left, an illustrated character with messy black hair and pale skin stands in a three-quarter view, wearing a dark coat over a light, open-collared shirt with a layered chest area. The character faces slightly toward the center, with a serious expression and downcast eyes. One hand holds a handgun-like object with a dark barrel and metallic highlights; the other arm is bent near the torso. A large glowing white-purple accent shape appears near the character’s head, and smaller white spark-like details appear around the figure. On the right side, there is a rectangular CRT-style screen displaying a scene inside the screen, with two vertical speaker-like sections on either side of the monitor casing. At the lower right, purple text reads “Night x Pulang.”

Setting:
The background appears to be a night scene with a cloudy sky, warm brown and dark tones, and faint building-like shapes or structures behind the clouds. Lighting is dramatic, with bright highlights on clouds and the character, and darker shading around the edges.

Visual Details:
The composition is split between the left character illustration and the right text and monitor. The title “ORPpy” is displayed in large decorative purple letters with a thick outline and swirling ornamental shapes beneath it, with the smaller word “solavty” directly under the main title. Several lines of white text are stacked in the center-right area, overlaid on clouds and the background. In the lower-right quadrant, the CRT monitor has a metallic gray frame with a screen showing a pale interface-like image and text. The monitor’s lighting and the overall graphic style suggest a promotional or streaming overlay layout.

Visible Text:
ORPpy
solavly
solo admin
no rcanatttr
1st n last gen – 7 days trainee
8+ certificate
Jeje
only eo, lt
Night x Pulang
Pulang
Insomniacks
Where.
Where did you go?
I've got so much to say
So you can't go on
Tak bisa ku percaya
Yang engkau sudah tiada
ku takkan menerima.

Practical Summary:
The image is a promotional-style graphic combining an illustrated character holding a handgun-like object with bold purple and white text. It also includes a CRT monitor graphic showing interface-like elements and additional overlaid text.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Ku takkan menerima..

# Notes
- The text **“no rcanattdr”** and **“only eo, It”** are transcribed exactly as they appear, but may be [unclear] due to stylization.
- **“insomniacK”** capitalization matches the screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
